meta.name: AlphaForge / Otter — AI Factor Mining Platform
meta.description: Dark-first quantitative finance SaaS platform with Indigo/Sky + Slate design system. Features WebGL aurora backgrounds, custom cursor, GSAP entrance animations, ASCII canvas hero, and gamified scratch-card interactions.

primary.role: Brand accent, CTA buttons, focus rings, sidebar active state, chart-1

secondary.role: Supporting accent, secondary buttons, chart-3, info semantic

accent.role: Muted surface for pills, card hover backgrounds, sidebar accent

neutral.usage: Full Slate scale from Tailwind, providing 11-step neutral ramp for both themes

color.contrast_strategy: High contrast dark-on-light / light-on-dark with Slate scale layering. Dark mode uses border + bg-step instead of shadows for depth.

typography.font_style_notes: Inter with OpenType features cv02/cv03/cv04/cv11 for refined letterforms. Geist also loaded as secondary option. Mono font (Roboto Mono) used for all data values with tabular-nums and -0.02em tracking. Heading and body share Inter but differentiate through weight and tracking.

spacing.content_density: comfortable — generous padding in cards (p-5, p-6), spacious section gaps
spacing.section_rhythm: Consistent 24-32px gaps between major sections, 12-16px between related elements

layout.columns: Responsive: 1-col mobile, 2-3 col tablet, up to 8-col metric grids on desktop
layout.alignment_tendency: Left-aligned sidebar layout for authenticated pages. Landing page uses asymmetric hero (left text, right ASCII canvas). Dashboard uses card grid.

shape.border_usage: Subtle 1px borders using Slate-200 (light) / Slate-800 (dark). Cards always have border. Inputs have border with indigo glow on focus. Tables use border-b for row separation.
shape.divider_style: 1px solid border-border (Slate-200/Slate-800), used as table row separators and section dividers

elevation.shadow_style: Soft diffused in light mode, none in dark mode (uses border + bg-step instead)
elevation.depth_cues: Light: soft shadows. Dark: border layering + bg-step (Slate-800 → Slate-900 → Slate-950). Elevated surfaces use backdrop-filter: blur(12px). Glow effects: 0 0 40px rgba(primary, 0.08-0.1).

iconography.preferred_set: Lucide React — LayoutDashboard, FlaskConical, Trophy, UserCog, Zap, Menu, X, ChevronLeft/Right/Down, Rocket, Library, FileText, Star, Eye, Plus, Filter, Columns3, Grid3x3, List, etc.

duration_scale.macro: 300-500ms — card entrance (400ms), GSAP stagger reveals (300ms per item), theme transitions

motion.entrance_pattern: GSAP staggered reveal: y:100 → y:0 with skewY:7 → skewY:0, power4.out easing, 0.08s stagger. Cards: y:30/16 → y:0 with opacity:0 → opacity:1, 0.06s stagger.
motion.philosophy: Cinematic entrance animations with GSAP for page titles and hero sections. Functional micro-transitions for interactive elements. Bouncy easing for playful button interactions.

components.button_style: Rounded-md (6px) default. Variants: default (bg-primary), destructive (bg-destructive), outline (border, transparent bg), secondary (bg-secondary), ghost (transparent), link (underline). Sizes: sm (h-8), default (h-9), lg (h-10), icon (size-9). Hover: bg-primary/90. Special: StarButton (rounded-3xl, bg-[#818cf8], white text), btn-bounce (scale 1.05 on hover, 0.98 on active).
components.input_style: Border border-input, rounded-md, focus: indigo glow ring (box-shadow 0 0 0 2px rgba(primary, 0.2)), border-color shift to primary/50.
components.card_style: surface-card: bg-card, border border-border, rounded-2xl (24px). Light: soft shadow, hover shadow upgrade. Dark: no shadow, hover border lightens to Slate-700. Transition: 200ms ease-in-out on bg, border, shadow.
components.navigation_pattern: Persistent left sidebar (220px expanded, 64px collapsed). Icon + label nav items. Collapsible sub-menus with ChevronDown. Mobile: overlay sidebar with backdrop. Bottom: theme toggle + user dropdown.
components.modal_style: Centered overlay with backdrop blur. Rounded-2xl. Close on backdrop click or X button. ScratchCard modal: full-screen overlay with Canvas interaction.
components.list_style: Table with border-b row separators. Hover: bg-slate-50/bg-slate-800/50. Monospace tabular-nums for data columns. Sortable column headers.
components.component_notes: ShinyTag for S/A grade badges (gradient fill, shine sweep on hover). B/C/D grades use white text + white/40 border pill. BorderGlowCard for premium CTA buttons (cursor-tracking edge glow with mesh-gradient). ScratchCard for gamified grade reveal (Canvas 2D scratch layer + confetti particles). ShineBorder for rotating gradient border animation.

aesthetic.visual_metaphor: Quantitative trading terminal meets modern SaaS dashboard — precision data display with playful gamification elements (scratch cards, grade reveals, aurora effects)
aesthetic.era_influence: 2024-2026 dark-mode SaaS with Web3/DeFi visual language influences (glowing borders, mesh gradients, ASCII art)

visual_language.complexity: rich — multiple animation systems (GSAP, WebGL, Canvas 2D, CSS), layered effects, gamification mechanics
visual_language.ornamentation: subtle accents — aurora backgrounds, glow effects, shine sweeps, but content remains clean and data-focused
visual_language.whitespace_usage: Generous within cards and sections, but data tables are dense. Hero sections use ample whitespace. Sidebar is compact.
visual_language.visual_weight_distribution: Left-heavy due to persistent sidebar. Content area balanced with card grids. Hero sections asymmetric (text left, visual right).
visual_language.focal_strategy: Progressive reveal — GSAP stagger animations draw attention sequentially. Grade scratch-card creates focal point through gamification.
visual_language.contrast_level: High — Indigo/Sky accents pop against Slate-950 dark background. Semantic colors (green/red/yellow) for data values create strong visual hierarchy.
visual_language.texture_usage: ASCII character grid as hero texture. Aurora WebGL shader as ambient background. Mesh-gradient glow on premium elements.

composition.hierarchy_method: Scale contrast + color weight + typographic hierarchy. Page titles are 36px bold, section headers 24px semibold, data values use monospace with color coding.
composition.balance_type: Asymmetric — sidebar creates persistent left weight. Content area uses grid-based card layouts for internal balance.
composition.flow_direction: Top-to-bottom with left sidebar anchor. Dashboard: title → metrics grid → charts → tables. Detail pages: name → summary cards → expression → charts → tests.
composition.grouping_strategy: Card-based grouping with consistent rounded-2xl containers. Related metrics grouped in grid rows. Collapsible sections for secondary content.
composition.negative_space_role: Structural — separates card groups, creates breathing room between sections. Dark background amplifies the effect of illuminated content areas.

imagery.photo_treatment: No photography used. All visuals are generative/programmatic.
imagery.illustration_style: ASCII art (AsciiHero canvas), WebGL aurora shader, programmatic light rays
imagery.graphic_elements: Gradient pills/tags, glow borders, confetti particles, scratch-card canvas overlay
imagery.pattern_usage: ASCII character grid as decorative pattern. Dot-grid implied by data table structure.
imagery.image_shape: Rectangular with rounded-2xl corners for cards. Full-bleed for aurora/ASCII backgrounds.

interaction_feel.feedback_style: Visual state changes (color, scale, glow) + toast notifications via Sonner. Focus rings with indigo glow.
interaction_feel.hover_behavior: Cards: border lightens + shadow upgrade. Buttons: scale(1.05) + brightness(1.1) bouncy. Tags: bg-position shift + shine sweep. Cursor: ring enlarges + fills with primary/10.
interaction_feel.transition_personality: Smooth glide for general UI (200ms ease-in-out). Bouncy elastic for buttons (300ms cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)). Cinematic for page entrances (GSAP power4.out).
interaction_feel.loading_style: Skeleton placeholders implied. Spinner component available. Card entrance animation (400ms fade-up).
interaction_feel.microinteraction_density: High — custom cursor tracking, star toggle animation, scramble text on brand name, encrypted text reveal, shine border rotation, border-glow cursor tracking, scratch-card canvas interaction

brand_voice_in_ui.formality: Semi-formal — uses quant finance terminology (Alpha, Sharpe, Drawdown, IS/OS) but adds fun elements (scratch cards, grade reveals, aurora effects)
brand_voice_in_ui.cta_style: Direct imperative — 'Get Your Skill Key', 'New Alpha', 'Create Alpha', 'Explore Prize Pools'
brand_voice_in_ui.empty_state_approach: Illustrated empty states with action prompts

overview.fallback_strategy: Aurora degrades to static gradient. Custom cursor hidden on touch devices. GSAP animations play once without scroll triggers.

background_effects.description: WebGL aurora borealis shader using OGL library with simplex noise. Renders smooth, animated color bands that drift horizontally. Used on landing/dashboard pages. Colors configurable via props (default: #5227FF, #7cff67, #5227FF).
background_effects.technology: WebGL via OGL (Renderer, Program, Mesh, Triangle) with custom GLSL fragment shader

particle_systems.description: Confetti particle burst triggered on S/A grade scratch-card reveal. 150 particles with random colors, sizes, velocities, and rotation. Gravity-affected with fade-out.

params.shape: Rectangles with random width (4-8px) and height (8-16px)
params.movement_pattern: Burst from center with random velocity (-15 to 15 horizontal, -20 to -5 vertical), gravity 0.3, rotation
params.color_behavior: Random selection from grade-specific palette (S: gold/amber, A: purple/violet)

3d_elements.description: No 3D models or Three.js scenes used

shader_effects.description: Simplex noise shader in Aurora component creates organic aurora borealis wave patterns. Fragment shader computes noise-based height field with exponential falloff and smoothstep alpha blending.

params.fragment_output: Noise-modulated color ramp with smoothstep alpha

scroll_triggered_animations.trigger_points: N/A (GSAP animations are mount-triggered, not scroll-triggered)

text_effects.description: Multiple text animation systems: (1) ScrambleText — GSAP-powered character scramble with random char cycling before reveal, auto-repeating. (2) EncryptedText — character-by-character reveal from random chars to actual text with IntersectionObserver trigger. (3) TextLoop — GSAP vertical text carousel with blur transition between items.

params.split_strategy: by-char (all three systems split text into individual characters)
params.animation_per_unit: ScrambleText: random char cycling (10 cycles) then reveal. EncryptedText: sequential reveal with 50ms delay per char. TextLoop: yPercent slide + blur filter.
params.stagger: ScrambleText: 0.02s per char. EncryptedText: 50ms sequential. TextLoop: N/A (full word swap).
params.effect_style: Cyber/hacker aesthetic — random character scramble before revealing actual text. Brand name 'Otter' uses this on the sidebar.

cursor_effects.description: Custom dual-element cursor: outer ring (32px, border-only, primary color at 50% opacity) + inner dot (5px, solid primary). Ring follows mouse with 150ms GSAP lerp. On hoverable elements: ring expands to 56px, fills with primary/10, border becomes solid primary. Theme-aware via CSS variable --primary.

params.size: 32px default ring, 56px hover ring, 5px center dot
params.blend_mode: None (no mix-blend-mode to preserve true Indigo color)
params.trail: Soft 150ms GSAP lerp on ring, instant on dot
params.interaction_zone: All interactive elements: a, button, [role=button], select, input, textarea, [data-cursor-hover]

image_effects.description: No image distortion or reveal effects. Visual interest comes from generative/programmatic elements instead of photography.

params.transparency: Opaque card backgrounds with blur on elevated surfaces (dropdowns, popovers)
params.shadow_type: Soft diffused (light mode only). Dark mode: border layering only.

canvas_drawings.description: AsciiHero — Canvas 2D rendering of ASCII character grid that responds to mouse position. Characters cycle through ' .:-=+*#%@' based on distance from mouse cursor and time-based animation. Creates a living, breathing dot-matrix texture. Also: ScratchCard Canvas for gamified grade reveal with eraser-style touch/mouse interaction.

params.draw_method: fillText for ASCII grid, globalCompositeOperation 'destination-out' for scratch eraser
params.color_scheme: Indigo (#4F47E6) for ASCII chars, silver (#C0C0C0) for scratch layer
params.interaction: Mouse position influences ASCII character selection (proximity-based). Scratch card: mouse/touch drag erases silver layer.

svg_animations.description: No SVG path animations or morphing

visual_effects.composite_notes: The design layers multiple effect systems: (1) WebGL aurora shader as ambient page background, (2) Canvas 2D ASCII grid as hero section texture, (3) GSAP entrance animations for titles (skewY reveal) and cards (stagger fade-up), (4) Custom cursor with GSAP-driven follow and hover state changes, (5) CSS-driven micro-interactions (shine sweeps, border glow, button bounce), (6) Canvas 2D scratch-card for gamified grade reveal with confetti burst. Performance consideration: WebGL and Canvas run on separate threads from GSAP DOM animations. Aurora uses premultiplied alpha blending for proper compositing. Custom cursor uses will-change:transform for GPU acceleration. BorderGlowCard uses CSS custom properties driven by JS mousemove for cursor-tracking glow without Canvas overhead.
